passages.passage_text: Directions (Q. 11-20): Read the following information carefully to answer the questions given below it. A student can be awarded free studentship by an institute if he follows conditions as underlined.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Prashant Kohli has passed XIIth Std. exam in Science stream. He was 19 years old as on 12.91. He has secured 70% marks in the entrance examination. He is able to pay the stipulated one-time deposit of Rs. 500.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Nitish Sharma has secured 72% marks in the entrance examination. He was born on 17th September 1971. He has not received marks in XIIth Std. final exam in Science stream. He is able to pay one-time deposit of Rs. 15,000 and the monthly tuition fee of Rs. 400.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Avinash Mundra passed XIIth Std. in Science with 55% marks and born on 13.73. He has secured 65% marks in the entrance examination. He can pay the monthly tuition fee of Rs. 400. He can pay one-time deposit of Rs. 9,000 only.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Jyoti Deshmukh has appeared for the final exam of XIIth Std. in Science stream. She was 19 years old on 20.3.91. She has secured 70% marks in entrance examination. She is able to pay the one-time deposit of Rs. 15,000 and monthly tuition fee of Rs. 400.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Prakash Sawant secured 50% and 65% marks in the XIIth Std. and entrance examination respectively. He will be 18 years and 6 months old on 1.6.91. He is able to pay one-time deposit of Rs. 500 and monthly tuition fees.
